title: athlete — authorization policies
description: One policy, AthletePolicy. Composes the ResolveScope middleware's decision: a caller with scope 'branch:X' can only see/act on athletes in branch X. Every ability defers to spatie/laravel-permission for the base check, then layers scope narrowing + PII / medical gates. Two special permissions carry `athletes.` prefix even though they read like actions: `athletes.view.medical` and `athletes.view.emergency_contact` (both permission-gated field-access filters, not full policies). The redactor pipeline applies these on egress — a caller with `athletes.view` but WITHOUT `athletes.view.medical` sees the Athlete row with medical_* fields stripped from the wire projection.

abilities.scope: any tenant member with athlete.core feature; narrows to caller's active branch scope when set. Guardians additionally narrow to athletes with active AthleteGuardian rows where user_id = current_user_id (via athletes.viewAny.own)

same as viewAny + self-view allowed via .own suffix (`athletes.view.own` narrows to WHERE user_id = current_user_id OR EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM athlete_guardians WHERE athlete_id = athletes.id AND user_id = current_user_id AND deleted_at IS NULL))
reception + hr + branch_manager + admin + owner. Distinct from athletes.update — the create action includes slot consumption + welcome-notification cascade + age-group snapshot resolution

hr + branch_manager (own branch) + admin + owner. Medical + emergency contact fields additionally require the field-level permissions below. Self-update by adult athletes uses .own with a restricted field set
hr + admin + owner. One-shot — post-first-link the user_id is immutable
hr + branch_manager (own branch) + admin + owner. paused_reason is HR-visible only (confidential-tier)
hr + admin + owner. Soft-terminal — the row is retained for alumni. cascade=true requires additional athletes.graduate.cascade permission
hr + branch_manager (own branch) + admin + owner. Adult athletes may withdraw themselves via `athletes.withdraw.own`; guardians may withdraw their assigned minors

hr + safeguarding_officer + owner. The redactor strips medical_* fields when the caller lacks this. Coach access requires consent_medical_disclosure=true (via MedicalDisclosureGate). Athletes themselves see own medical via `athletes.view.medical.own`; guardians see minor's medical when consent_medical_disclosure=true
hr + safeguarding_officer + owner. Distinct permission — the observer refuses writes without this even if caller has athletes.update. Requires athlete_medical_tracking entitlement
hr + coach + reception + branch_manager (own branch) + safeguarding_officer + owner. Redactor strips fields for others. `athletes.view.emergency_contact.own` allows self-view / guardian-view

hr + reception + branch_manager + admin + owner. Additionally, adult athletes may update their OWN emergency contact via /me/athletes/{athlete}/emergency-contact (permission `athletes.manage.emergency_contact.own`); guardians for their assigned minors
hr + reception + branch_manager + safeguarding_officer + admin + owner + athlete (own) + guardian (own children)

hr + admin + owner for admin recording; guardians + adult athletes for own consents via `.own`. For minors, the recording user MUST be a User with an active AthleteGuardian row + has_legal_custody=true (Wave 3b hard-fail via cross-module rule)
safeguarding_officer + hr + owner. Emits an audit CSV of medical mutations for a tenant.
Medical + emergency contact ALWAYS stripped; minor names redacted to initials only
super_admin only with two-person approval. Emits a signed audit CSV of every medical change across all tenants
